version: AMOS Research Source & Evidence Quality Engine v0.1
purpose: Make AMOS independently seek, score, classify, and challenge evidence instead of relying on user confirmation.
core_principles: User-provided sources are leads, not proof.
A source can be useful and still biased.
Long-term usefulness depends on cycle-validity, falsifiability, and predictive record.
Official data is not interpretation; commentary is not data.
Every thesis requires evidence, counter-evidence, uncertainty, and invalidation.

official_data.best_use: macro facts, financial facts, policy facts

company_primary.main_risk: management framing, adjusted metrics, selective emphasis
company_primary.best_use: business model, guidance, financials, customer risk

market_data.best_use: market pricing, capital flow, technical confirmation

sell_side_research.main_risk: consensus bias, investment banking conflict, delayed reaction
sell_side_research.best_use: consensus revision, industry framing, valuation ranges

independent_research.best_use: deep domain insight, early narrative detection

youtube_creator.main_risk: performance theater, hindsight bias, monetized conviction, bull-market survivorship
youtube_creator.best_use: framework extraction, market psychology, real-time narrative tracking

x_twitter.main_risk: viral incentives, missing context, selective screenshots

examples: user notices Space and Quantum rising with AI Infra
user_observation.main_risk: confirmation bias, recency bias, emotional salience
user_observation.best_use: research trigger, attention routing, user-specific context

structural_macro.risk: can be too bearish or too abstract

evidence_pipeline: Separate fact, interpretation, forecast, and opinion
Define applicable regime and failure conditions

application_to_amos.macro_booklist: Books become framework sources, not direct trading signals.
application_to_amos.youtube_creators: Creators become framework candidates and real-time narrative/market-state sensors.
application_to_amos.x_posts: X posts are early signals and source discovery, not proof.
application_to_amos.earnings_calls: Primary evidence for business and narrative validation.
application_to_amos.market_data: Final judge for whether narrative is being priced.

non_negotiable_rules: Every source must have a failure mode.
A source can be useful for one module and useless for another.
User trust in a creator is a lead, not final evidence.
AMOS must be able to disagree with user-favored sources.
